scripts.seed: pnpm run build && [ -f ../../.env ] && set -a && . ../../.env && set +a; AWS_ENDPOINT_URL=http://localhost:4566 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test ./bin/seed
scripts.build: mkdir -p bin && go build -o bin/api ./cmd/api && go build -o bin/lambda-http ./cmd/lambda/http && go build -o bin/lambda-sqs ./cmd/lambda/sqs && go build -o bin/lambda-eventbridge ./cmd/lambda/eventbridge && go build -o bin/migrate ./cmd/migrate && go build -o bin/seed ./cmd/seed
scripts.migrate:controlplane: pnpm run build && [ -f ../../.env ] && set -a && . ../../.env && set +a; AWS_ENDPOINT_URL=http://localhost:4566 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test ./bin/migrate -target controlplane
scripts.migrate:tenants: pnpm run build && [ -f ../../.env ] && set -a && . ../../.env && set +a; AWS_ENDPOINT_URL=http://localhost:4566 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test ./bin/migrate -target tenants
scripts.migrate:all: pnpm run build && [ -f ../../.env ] && set -a && . ../../.env && set +a; AWS_ENDPOINT_URL=http://localhost:4566 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test ./bin/migrate -target all
